name: Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II
business: Mountain Lake Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on October 16, 2025, formed for the purpose of effecting a Business Combination with one or more businesses or entities. As of the date of this Report, it has not selected any specific Business Combination target and has generated no operating revenues.

catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by (i) January 28, 2028, the end of our Combination Period, which is 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering, (ii) such earlier liquidation date as our Board may approve or (iii) such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Amended and Restated Articles.
